turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, uh, do you have ambulance services or any emergency line?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we do. Our 24-hour emergency helpline is 020-66001200. We also have two ambulances on standby for patient transport within Pune city. For immediate life-threatening emergencies, always call 108 first.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, and is your emergency department open at night?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, our emergency and casualty department is open 24 hours, 7 days a week. We have a resident doctor on call at all times through the night.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good to know. And just out of curiosity — do you have a blood bank too?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have a licensed blood bank with O, A, B, and AB groups in both positive and negative. For rare groups, we coordinate with partner hospitals. The blood bank is also operational round the clock.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Excellent. I'm noting this down for my family. Very reassuring to know.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We're here whenever you need us. Stay safe!
